steps.title: Target the requested detail
steps.content: The student wants the title of J.D. Salinger's first published short story. The relevant note gives that title: The Young Folks.

steps.title: Choose the title statement
steps.content: A gives the year and publication, B gives the genre, and C gives only the year. None of those identifies the title. The sentence naming The Young Folks directly accomplishes the goal. The answer is D.
